tagline: Smart Team Management Software for Modern Businesses

task_management.description: Create tasks, assign to team members, set deadlines and priorities
details: Tasks can be assigned to one or multiple people
Set priority levels: low, medium, high, critical
Add subtasks and checklists inside each task
Track task progress with status updates

file_attachments.description: Attach any file type to tasks
details: Supports documents, images, spreadsheets, PDFs
Up to 100MB per file
Files are stored securely in the cloud

reminders.description: Automated reminders so nothing is missed
details: Email reminders are free and included in all plans
SMS reminders available in Pro and Enterprise plans
SMS reminders cost $50/month extra on Basic plan
Reminders sent 24 hours and 1 hour before deadline

reporting.description: Automated reports to keep management informed
details: Weekly PDF report sent every Monday morning
Reports include task completion rates, overdue tasks, team performance
Advanced analytics available in Pro and Enterprise plans
Custom report scheduling available in Pro and Enterprise

collaboration.description: Team collaboration tools built into every task
details: Comment on tasks in real time
Tag team members in comments
Activity log shows full history of every task
Team dashboard shows everyone's workload

integrations.description: Connect TaskMaster Pro with tools your team already uses
details: Google Workspace (Gmail, Drive, Calendar)
Microsoft 365 (Outlook, OneDrive, Teams)
Slack notifications
Zapier for custom automations
REST API available for custom integrations (Enterprise only)

trial.standard: 7 days free trial for up to 10 users
trial.extension: Can be extended to 10 days on request
conditions: Full access to Pro features during trial
Trial can be extended once per company

video_tutorials.details: Full library of step-by-step video tutorials covering all features

live_training.details: 1-on-1 live training session with a TaskMaster expert, up to 2 hours

documentation.details: Full written documentation and user guides available online

pricing_discounts.first_month_discount: First month available at $120 for new Pro plan customers
pricing_discounts.minimum_discount_allowed: $100/month — sales reps cannot go below this
pricing_discounts.decision_deadline: Discounted offers valid for 2 weeks from the date of demo

security.data_encryption: All data encrypted at rest and in transit using AES-256
security.access_control: Role-based access control — admin, manager, member roles

onboarding.setup_time: Most teams are fully set up within 1 business day
onboarding.data_migration: Free data migration assistance for teams switching from other tools
onboarding.supported_imports: Import from Excel, Trello, Asana, and CSV files

faqs.question: Can we use TaskMaster Pro on mobile?
faqs.answer: Yes, TaskMaster Pro has native iOS and Android apps included in all plans at no extra cost.

faqs.question: What happens to our data if we cancel?
faqs.answer: You can export all your data before cancellation. Data is retained for 30 days after cancellation then permanently deleted.

faqs.question: Can we upgrade or downgrade our plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes take effect from the next billing cycle.

faqs.question: Is there a limit on storage?
faqs.answer: Basic plan includes 50GB storage. Pro plan includes 200GB. Enterprise has unlimited storage.

faqs.question: Do you offer refunds?
faqs.answer: We offer a full refund within 14 days of purchase if you are not satisfied.

faqs.question: Can multiple people be assigned to one task?
faqs.answer: Yes, tasks can be assigned to multiple team members simultaneously.

faqs.question: Does TaskMaster Pro work offline?
faqs.answer: The mobile app supports limited offline mode. Changes sync automatically when connection is restored.
